react_icons.reason: Official NASA logo from Simple Icons
Official SpaceX logo from Simple Icons

downloaded_assets.title: Mysterious Forest Light
downloaded_assets.description: A cinematic shot of a lone light source in a foggy forest at night
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A dark, atmospheric forest scene at night with thick fog. A bright, cool-toned light source (flashlight or mysterious orb) glows from the ground, casting long shadows of bare trees. A lone silhouette stands near the light.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dominant deep greens, blacks, and a sharp blue-white glow. High contrast, perfect for dark mode.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Lone figure near a mysterious glowing light in a foggy night forest
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Perfectly matches the mysterious forest silhouette request. The fog and localized light source create a professional, non-cheesy paranormal vibe.

downloaded_assets.title: Desert Silhouette with Glow
downloaded_assets.description: Futuristic silhouette under a starry night sky
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A silhouette of a person wearing a glowing mask or device in a vast, dark desert. Above them, a dense field of stars and subtle nebulosity fills the sky.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Deep charcoal and navy tones with subtle amber and violet in the star field. Cool cyan glow from the mask.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Silhouette under a vast starry sky in the desert
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Strong technical/futuristic vibe that avoids alien cliches while maintaining a mysterious atmosphere.

downloaded_assets.title: Dense Star Field
downloaded_assets.description: Subtle star field for application background
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A high-resolution, dense field of distant stars against a pure black and deep teal sky. No prominent landscape features, just a vast cosmic expanse.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Deep teal-black background with tiny white and soft blue star points.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Clean and professional star field that works as a subtle background layer in dark mode.

downloaded_assets.title: Distant Horizon Lights
downloaded_assets.description: Eerie lights on a dark horizon line
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A minimal shot of a dark landscape at night. A thin line of distant city or mysterious lights glows on the horizon under a clear, starry sky.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Near-black silhouette with warm amber points on the horizon.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Distant lights on a dark horizon under a starry sky
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Perfectly captures the 'distant lights' sightings often reported in UFO tracking.

downloaded_assets.title: NASA Logo
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Red NASA 'worm' or meatball style vector mark
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Crisp SVG logo for high-quality technical presentation.

downloaded_assets.title: SETI Institute Logo
downloaded_assets.description: Official SETI logo for dark backgrounds
downloaded_assets.visual_description: SETI Institute wordmark and graphic logo

missing_assets.reason: Could not find a high-quality professional UFO SVG that wasn't 'cheesy' or cartoonish. Recommended to use a neutral technical icon from react-icons/si (like SiRadar or SiSatellite) or a simple geometric craft silhouette if custom SVG is added later.

css_textures.description: Technical dot grid overlay for data-centric sections
css_textures.recommended_for: Layering over the star-field or dark backgrounds to add a radar/technical feel

css_textures.description: Subtle noise texture to reduce banding on dark gradients

usage_notes: Use 'bg-star-field.jpg' as a fixed background with low opacity (0.3-0.5) to keep text readable.
The hero photos have high contrast; use light text with a subtle text-shadow for better legibility.
For the UFO icon, consider using SiRadar or SiTrackers from react-icons as a professional alternative to a 'flying saucer' icon.
